name: Biogen Inc.
lede: Biogen runs one capability center in Bengaluru. Bengaluru, covering gcc/gic, built over three years.
insight: A single Biogen center is easy to miss and easier to misread. We track its type, functions and the people who run it, so you can decide if it belongs on your target list.

about.description: Biogen's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning gcc/gic. The centers deliver IT and R&D and ER&D for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all three decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Biogen operate in India?
faq.a: Biogen operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Biogen have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Biogen's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Biogen run in India?
faq.a: Biogen runs gcc/gic centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Biogen's India GCCs?
faq.a: Biogen's India centers employ in the 51 to 100 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Biogen's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 3 leaders at Biogen's India centers, across Finance, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
